page_content:
ARTT150 Introduction to Art Theory (3 Credits)

Fundamental concepts of global, philosophic, and critical art theory examined through various historic and contemporary texts, and the analysis of works of art.

ARTT169 Special Topics in Study Abroad | (1-6 Credits)

Special topics course taken as part of an approved study abroad program.

Repeatable to: 15 credits if content differs.

ARTT200 Three-Dimensional Art Fundamentals (3 Credits) Fundamental concepts of three-dimensional form and space examined through the manipulation and organization of various materials. Prerequisite: ARTT100 and ARTT110.

ARTT208 Intermediate Special Topics in Art (3 Credits) Intermediate special topics in Art. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
